administrator_login.description: The administrator login for the MySQL server.

administrator_password.description: The password for the server administrator.

backup_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain backups for the server.

create_mode.description: Specifies the mode to create the server, such as Default or PointInTimeRestore.

delegated_subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet to which the server is connected.

geo_redundant_backup_enabled.description: Enables geo-redundant backup for the server.

name.description: The name of the MySQL flexible server.

point_in_time_restore_time_in_utc.description: The time in UTC to restore the server to.

private_dns_zone_id.description: The ID of the private DNS zone for the server.

sku_name.description: The SKU name for the server, defining its performance.

source_server_id.description: The ID of the source server for replication or restore.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource.

zone.description: Specifies the availability zone for the server.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
